description: MK-01 buyer-demo story tips, wire-local hover copy, and script names. Keys align with buyer-demo-defaults.json and catalog/recipes/prebuild-vertical-demo-matrix.md.

healthcare-clinic-screening.card_tip: Full buyer story: EHR chart sync + SMS approval with human-in-the-loop review inbox.

ehr_sync_complex.story: Lookup patient context, sync chart to local EHR, and queue SMS for staff approval before send.
ehr_sync_complex.wire_tip: Wire EHR + messaging first; calendar optional for booking variants. Review inbox catches outbound SMS.
ehr_sync_complex.analytics_tip: Filter Calls by ehr_sync_complex and sync_chart_to_ehr; live workflow timeline on healthcare demo calls.
ehr_sync_complex.settings_tip: Settings → Local demo EHR records + messaging templates.
ehr_sync_complex.compliance_note: PHI: use redaction on analytics exports before external decks.

retail-wismo-faq.card_tip: Collections and payment-plan promises without a live billing stack.

collections_complex.story: Capture a compliant payment promise after WISMO — amount, cadence, confirmation code.
collections_complex.wire_tip: Creates capture_payment_promise → local payments API. Map promised_amount for mapped_data proof.
collections_complex.analytics_tip: Analytics proof link pre-fills catalog_slug, collections_complex, and tool_name.
collections_complex.settings_tip: Settings → Local demo payments lists recorded promises.
collections_complex.compliance_note: Collections: confirm recording disclosure and no card PAN on the call.

b2b-saas-trial-nurture.card_tip: Trial → paid motion with CRM stage update — no Salesforce keys in the demo org.

conversion_complex.story: Qualify PQL intent and push deal stage to closed won via local CRM integration.
conversion_complex.wire_tip: One click wires update_crm_deal_stage to local integrations; map deal_stage and deal_id.
conversion_complex.analytics_tip: Filter by conversion_complex + update_crm_deal_stage on call detail.
conversion_complex.settings_tip: Settings → Local demo integrations shows CRM action log.

insurance-fnol-faq.card_tip: FNOL containment with tokenized claims status lookup.

claims_lookup_complex.story: Verify policy token, then speak claim status from local claims API — no full policy # on the call.
claims_lookup_complex.wire_tip: Wires lookup_claim_status → local integrations. Map claim_status and claim_id.
claims_lookup_complex.analytics_tip: Use Analytics proof on the pack card for pre-filtered Calls list.
claims_lookup_complex.settings_tip: Seed claim tokens under Local demo integrations before Web test.
claims_lookup_complex.compliance_note: Partner review recommended before external GTM.

hospitality-travel-concierge.card_tip: Guest recovery: cancellation fee waiver or credit without a live CRS.

waiver_complex.story: Apply a documented waiver or credit after guest verification — recovery without live PMS keys.
waiver_complex.wire_tip: Wires apply_cancellation_waiver → local integrations. Map waiver_status and credit_amount.
waiver_complex.analytics_tip: Filter waiver_complex + apply_cancellation_waiver; upsell variant uses offer_room_upgrade.
waiver_complex.settings_tip: Settings → Local demo integrations → cancellations/waiver endpoint.
waiver_complex.compliance_note: Confirm rate/fee disclosure language matches your property policy.

financial-services-banking-faq.card_tip: Tokenized balance lookup after identity verify — PCI-safe tier-1 containment.

balance_lookup_complex.story: Verify caller identity, then read available balance from tokenized account lookup — never full PAN.
balance_lookup_complex.wire_tip: Wires lookup_account_balance → local integrations. Map available_balance and as_of_date.
balance_lookup_complex.analytics_tip: Analytics proof link filters balance_lookup_complex + lookup_account_balance.
balance_lookup_complex.settings_tip: Settings → Local demo integrations → accounts/balance endpoint.

telecom-utilities-outage-faq.card_tip: Live outage ETAs from local OSS/BSS stub — no field-service keys.

outage_status_complex.story: Zip or account lookup → active outage status and restoration ETA.
outage_status_complex.wire_tip: Wires lookup_outage_status → local integrations. Map outage_id and restoration_eta.
outage_status_complex.analytics_tip: Telecom call-detail deck frame shows mapped_data on lookup_outage_status span.
outage_status_complex.settings_tip: Settings → Local demo integrations outage status endpoint.

smb-franchise-location-faq.card_tip: Multi-location lead capture into local CRM stub.

lead_capture_complex.story: Capture lead intent with location code for franchise routing follow-up.
lead_capture_complex.wire_tip: Wires capture_lead_intent → local integrations. Map intent_id and confirmation_code.

public-sector-civic-services-faq.card_tip: Permit status lookup for civic self-service.

permit_status_complex.story: Tokenized permit lookup with last-updated status for caller reassurance.
permit_status_complex.wire_tip: Wires lookup_permit_status → local integrations. Map permit_status and permit_id.

hr-staffing-recruiting-faq.card_tip: ATS application status without live Greenhouse/Lever keys.

application_status_complex.story: Lookup application status by token after candidate verifies email or ref code.
application_status_complex.wire_tip: Wires lookup_application_status → local integrations. Map application_status.
